title: perella tetrasepala
intro: Perella tetrasepala, also known as Perilla, is an annual herbaceous plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Perella tetrasepala include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Perella tetrasepala include tea, oil, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
